#1 Software for
Accounting Firms

Manage your accounting firm's activities, from acquiring clients to handling projects and documents to invoicing, all centralized in a single platform.

Start now
Meet an advisor
  • Micro Business (1-5 employees)
  • Small Business (6-50 employees)
  • Midsized company (51-250 employees)
  • Micro entreprise (1-5 employés) - Français
  • Petite entreprise (6-50 employés) - Français
  • Empresas Pequeñas (<50 empleados) - Español
  • Large company (250+ employees)

A VAT closing that used to take 4 days is now done in 3 hours with Odoo, with a better service for our clients: real-time accounting.

Wim Van den Brande
Head of KPMG Tax, Legal & Accountancy

From the lead to the invoice

Your leads are centralized in one intuitive pipeline, whether they come from email, phone, or website forms. Schedule follow-ups in a couple of clicks.

Turn leads into sales with ease, and send your clients customized quotations describing your offer, complete with pictures, references, and more.

Invoice clients on your terms, based on time and material, fixed rates, or milestones.

Smart service management

Keep track of each project with automated task creation, intuitive timesheets, and a robust project dashboard.

Create tasks
Schedule activities Fill in timesheets

Next-level
accounting

28,000 banks supported

Speed matters. Our Accounting app processes all operations in less than 90 milliseconds, faster than the blink of an eye.

Smart reconciliation. Never import bank statements manually again. Odoo integrates with 28,000 banks from all around the world!

95% of the transactions are matched automatically with the financial records.

Secure document workspace

Each project gets its own document workspace, where you can easily store, organize, and manage documents in a secure way.

Odoo's eSign ensures that you can provide binding signatures online - all it takes is a click.

Find out more about eSign!
But wait! There's more.

All the features
done right.

All-in-one sales management

From receiving a lead through quotation and sale to invoicing, the entire process is automated with minimal manual input.

Project dashboard

Manage all details related to each project, including time spent, profitability analysis, milestones, activities, and more.

Electronic invoicing (EDI)

Various EDI file formats are available depending on your company's country. Send and receive electronic invoices in multiple formats and standards, such as Peppol.

See documentation

Compliant e-signatures

Odoo's eSign is compliant with eIDAS (for all European Countries), the US ESIGN Act (United States), the ITA and ICA (India), as well as most countries in the world.

Other countries list

Integrated timesheets

Track time spent on tasks and invoice clients based on accurate timesheets. Set up tracking by hours, or days - Odoo adjusts to your unique business needs.

CRM pipeline

Your leads are centralized in one, easy-to-use dashboard.

One need, one app.

Expand as you grow.

Odoo is a suite of open source business apps that cover all your company needs: CRM, eCommerce, accounting, inventory, point of sale, project management, etc.

Odoo's unique value proposition is to be at the same time very easy to use and fully integrated.
